Positioning

Creative tech specialist for visual storytelling

The goal of this portfolio is to show not only final visuals, but the production logic behind them: reference control, character consistency, cinematic lighting, motion direction, and a workflow that can be scaled for brands and teams.

Languages: Spanish (Native), English (Professional Working Proficiency / B2)

Pipeline

Cinematic AI workflow systems.

A structured process that combines story development, references, motion, light, color, and post‑production into a repeatable pipeline.

01

Concept & storyboard

Start with scene intent, visual mood, and shot sequencing before generation.

02

Reference frame control

Lock character, wardrobe, lighting, and composition for consistency.

03

Motion direction

Guide camera and subject movement to keep the sequence cinematic and coherent.

04

Color & atmosphere

Shape the tone with contrast, grading, and mood control in post‑production.

05

Final edit & sound

Deliver with rhythm, sound design, and polish for a production‑ready result.
